phase_1_001.md.definition: The sun is a warm light above the ground.

phase_1_002.md.definition: The moon is a soft light in the night sky.

phase_1_003.md.definition: A star is a tiny light that shines in the dark.

phase_1_004.md.definition: A cloud is a body of water drops that brings rain.

phase_1_005.md.definition: Rain is water that wets and fills the land.

phase_1_006.md.definition: Snow is frozen water that cools and covers the land.

phase_1_007.md.definition: Wind is air that pushes and moves things.

phase_1_008.md.definition: A river is a moving body of water that shapes the land.

phase_1_009.md.definition: A stone is a hard piece of rock used to hold things in place.

phase_1_010.md.definition: Fire is burning heat that warms and gives light.

phase_1_011.md.definition: A dog is a furry animal kept by people.

phase_1_012.md.definition: A cat is a furry animal that hunts and rests.

phase_1_013.md.definition: A bird is a winged animal that builds nests.

phase_1_014.md.definition: A fish is an animal that swims and feeds in water.

phase_1_015.md.definition: A frog is an animal that leaps and catches prey.

phase_1_016.md.definition: A horse is a large animal that carries and pulls.

phase_1_017.md.definition: A butterfly is a winged insect that feeds on flowers.

phase_1_018.md.definition: A turtle is a slow animal with a hard shell for protection.

phase_1_019.md.definition: A worm is a soft animal that moves and feeds in the soil.

phase_1_020.md.definition: A bunny is a small soft animal with long ears.

phase_1_021.md.definition: A cup is a small container used for drinking.

phase_1_022.md.definition: A spoon is a tool used for eating and stirring.

phase_1_023.md.definition: A plate is a flat dish used for serving food.

phase_1_024.md.definition: A bowl is a deep dish used for soup and cereal.

phase_1_025.md.definition: A chair is a piece of furniture used for sitting.

phase_1_026.md.definition: A table is a flat piece of furniture used for placing things.

phase_1_027.md.definition: A door is a barrier used to enter and leave a room.

phase_1_028.md.definition: A window is a clear opening used for light and air.

phase_1_029.md.definition: A bed is a piece of furniture used for sleeping and resting.

phase_1_030.md.definition: A lamp is a device used to light a room.

phase_1_031.md.definition: An apple is a round fruit eaten fresh.

phase_1_032.md.definition: A banana is a long fruit eaten by peeling.

phase_1_033.md.definition: Bread is baked food used for eating and spreading.

phase_1_034.md.definition: Milk is a white liquid used for drinking and cooking.

phase_1_035.md.definition: An egg is a shelled food used for cooking.

phase_1_036.md.definition: A carrot is a crunchy vegetable eaten raw or cooked.

phase_1_037.md.definition: Cheese is food made from milk used for eating.

phase_1_038.md.definition: Water is a clear liquid used for drinking and washing.

phase_1_039.md.definition: A cookie is a small sweet food eaten as a treat.

phase_1_040.md.definition: A berry is a small soft fruit eaten fresh.

phase_1_041.md.definition: A shoe is a foot covering used for walking.

phase_1_042.md.definition: A sock is a soft covering used to keep a foot warm.

phase_1_043.md.definition: A hat is a head covering used for warmth or shade.

phase_1_044.md.definition: A coat is a piece of clothing used for keeping warm.

phase_1_045.md.definition: A shirt is a piece of clothing used to cover the upper body.

phase_1_046.md.definition: Pants are clothing used to cover the legs.

phase_1_047.md.definition: A glove is a hand covering used for warmth and protection.

phase_1_048.md.definition: A scarf is a cloth worn for warmth around the neck.

phase_1_049.md.definition: A belt is a strap used to hold clothing in place.

phase_1_050.md.definition: A button is a small fastener used to join pieces of clothing.

phase_1_051.md.definition: A hammer is a tool used for hitting nails.

phase_1_052.md.definition: A rope is a strong line used for tying and pulling.

phase_1_053.md.definition: A wheel is a round object used for rolling and turning.

phase_1_054.md.definition: A key is a tool used for opening and locking.

phase_1_055.md.definition: A bucket is a container used for carrying water and things.

phase_1_056.md.definition: A shovel is a tool used for digging and moving earth.

phase_1_057.md.definition: A broom is a tool used for sweeping floors.

phase_1_058.md.definition: A nail is a small metal pin used for joining wood.

phase_1_059.md.definition: A hook is a curved object used for hanging things.

phase_1_060.md.definition: A lever is a bar used for lifting heavy things.

phase_1_061.md.definition: A car is a vehicle used for carrying people.

phase_1_062.md.definition: A boat is a vehicle used for crossing water.

phase_1_063.md.definition: A train is a vehicle used for carrying people and goods.

phase_1_064.md.definition: A bike is a vehicle used for riding and traveling.

phase_1_065.md.definition: A plane is a vehicle used for flying people and goods.

phase_1_066.md.definition: A bus is a large vehicle used for carrying many people.

phase_1_067.md.definition: A sled is a vehicle used for sliding on snow.

phase_1_068.md.definition: A wagon is a vehicle used for carrying loads.

phase_1_069.md.definition: A truck is a vehicle used for carrying heavy goods.

phase_1_070.md.definition: A ship is a large vehicle used for carrying people and cargo.

phase_1_071.md.definition: A block is a solid piece used for building and playing.

phase_1_072.md.definition: A ball is a round object used for throwing and catching.

phase_1_073.md.definition: A box is a container used for storing and carrying things.

phase_1_074.md.definition: A book is a set of pages used for reading.

phase_1_075.md.definition: A doll is a toy used for pretend play.

phase_1_076.md.definition: A crayon is a tool used for coloring and drawing.

phase_1_077.md.definition: Paper is a flat material used for writing and drawing.

phase_1_078.md.definition: A ring is a circular band worn for decoration.

phase_1_079.md.definition: A stick is a thin piece of wood used for poking and pointing.

phase_1_080.md.definition: A brick is a solid block used for building walls.

phase_1_081.md.definition: A hand is a body part used for holding and touching.

phase_1_082.md.definition: A foot is a body part used for walking and standing.

phase_1_083.md.definition: An eye is a body part used for seeing the world.

phase_1_084.md.definition: An ear is a body part used for hearing.

phase_1_085.md.definition: A nose is a body part used for smelling and breathing.

phase_1_086.md.definition: A mouth is a body part used for eating and speaking.

phase_1_087.md.definition: A tooth is a hard body part used for biting and chewing.

phase_1_088.md.definition: Skin is the outer body covering that protects what is inside.

phase_1_089.md.definition: Hair is strands that grow and protect the head.

phase_1_090.md.definition: A belly is the front part of the body that holds food.

phase_1_091.md.definition: A home is a place used for living, eating, and sleeping.

phase_1_092.md.definition: A farm is a place used for growing food and keeping animals.

phase_1_093.md.definition: A forest is a large wooded area that shelters animals.

phase_1_094.md.definition: A garden is a place used for growing plants and flowers.

phase_1_095.md.definition: A beach is a sandy place where people walk and play.

phase_1_096.md.definition: A road is a flat path used for walking and driving.

phase_1_097.md.definition: A bridge is a structure used for crossing over water or gaps.

phase_1_098.md.definition: A field is a large open area used for growing crops.

phase_1_099.md.definition: A pond is a small body of water where animals live.

phase_1_100.md.definition: A tree is a tall plant that gives shade and shelter.

phase_1_101.md.definition: A hill is a rise of land that gives a view and shelter.

phase_1_102.md.definition: Grass is a thin green plant that feeds animals and covers the ground.

phase_1_103.md.definition: The sea is a large body of salt water that gives food and shelter.

phase_1_104.md.definition: A branch is an arm of a tree that gives rest and shade.

phase_1_105.md.definition: Light is brightness that gives sight and warmth.

phase_1_106.md.definition: Thunder is a loud sound that gives a warning of a storm.

phase_1_107.md.definition: A head is the top part of the body used for thinking and sensing.

phase_1_108.md.definition: A bone is a hard part that gives shape and strength to the body.

phase_1_109.md.definition: A finger is a long part of the hand used for touching and holding.

phase_1_110.md.definition: A thumb is the short digit used for gripping and pressing.

phase_1_111.md.definition: A knee is the joint in the leg used for walking and bending.

phase_1_112.md.definition: A glass is a tall clear container used for drinking liquids.

phase_1_113.md.definition: A bottle is a tall container used for storing and pouring liquid.

phase_1_114.md.definition: A pot is a deep container used for cooking and boiling.

phase_1_115.md.definition: A jar is a wide container used for storing thick food.

phase_1_116.md.definition: A bag is a soft container used for carrying and storing dry things.

phase_1_117.md.definition: Honey is a thick sweet liquid used for spreading and sweetening food.

phase_1_118.md.definition: Soup is a warm liquid food eaten with a spoon.

phase_1_119.md.definition: Flour is a fine white powder used for making bread and baked food.

phase_1_120.md.definition: Oil is a smooth liquid used for cooking and baking food.

phase_1_121.md.definition: Dust is a fine dry powder swept and wiped away to keep things clean.

phase_1_122.md.definition: A screw is a small metal fastener used for joining wood and material.

phase_1_123.md.definition: A spider is a small animal that makes webs and catches insects.

phase_1_124.md.definition: A bee is a small insect that makes honey and helps flowers grow.

phase_1_125.md.definition: An ant is a very small insect that carries food and builds tunnels.

phase_1_126.md.definition: Corn is a tall plant used for food and for feeding animals.

phase_1_127.md.definition: Sand is tiny dry grains used for building and play.

phase_1_128.md.definition: Wood is a hard material from trees used for building and burning.

phase_1_129.md.definition: Ice is frozen water used to keep things cold.

phase_2_01.md.definition: A snowball is a ball of snow thrown in play.

phase_2_02.md.definition: A snowflake is a small piece of snow that wets what it lands on.

phase_2_03.md.definition: A snowdrift is a pile of snow that blocks paths.

phase_2_04.md.definition: A raindrop is a drop of water that adds to puddles.

phase_2_05.md.definition: A rainfall is water that fills and feeds the land.

phase_2_06.md.definition: A waterfall is water that shapes rock and fills pools.

phase_2_07.md.definition: A riverbank is the side of a river that guides the flow.

phase_2_08.md.definition: A riverbed is the ground under a river that shapes and guides the flow.

phase_2_09.md.definition: Sunlight is light from the sun that warms and lights.

phase_2_10.md.definition: Moonlight is soft light from the moon that lights the dark.

phase_2_11.md.definition: Starlight is light from stars that fills the night sky.

phase_2_12.md.definition: A spiderweb is a web made by a spider for catching food.

phase_2_13.md.definition: A beehive is a home for bees that stores honey.

phase_2_14.md.definition: A birdhouse is a house for birds that shelters eggs.

phase_2_15.md.definition: An anthill is a home for ants with tunnels inside.

phase_2_16.md.definition: A fishpond is a pond with fish that can be fed and kept.

phase_2_17.md.definition: A doghouse is a house for a dog that gives shelter.

phase_2_18.md.definition: A firefly is an insect that makes light in the dark.

phase_2_19.md.definition: A bookshelf is a shelf used to store and organize books.

phase_2_20.md.definition: A doorbell is a device used to signal someone is at the door.

phase_2_21.md.definition: A doorstep is a step at a door where people stand and enter.

phase_2_22.md.definition: A doorknob is a handle used to open and close a door.

phase_2_23.md.definition: A windowsill is a ledge at a window where things are placed.

phase_2_24.md.definition: A cupboard is a storage space used for keeping food and dishes.

phase_2_25.md.definition: A bedsheet is a sheet used to cover a bed for sleep.

phase_2_26.md.definition: A lampshade is a cover for a lamp that shapes the light.

phase_2_27.md.definition: A breadcrumb is a small piece of bread left after eating.

phase_2_28.md.definition: An eggshell is the outer covering of an egg that protects what is inside.

phase_2_29.md.definition: A milkshake is a cold drink made from milk for sipping.

phase_2_30.md.definition: A cupcake is a small cake eaten as a sweet treat.

phase_2_31.md.definition: Popcorn is puffed corn eaten as a crunchy snack.

phase_2_32.md.definition: A shoelace is a lace used to hold a shoe on a foot.

phase_2_33.md.definition: A sweatshirt is a warm shirt worn for warmth and comfort.

phase_2_34.md.definition: A raincoat is a coat worn to keep dry in the rain.

phase_2_35.md.definition: A hatband is a band that holds and trims a hat.

phase_2_36.md.definition: A wheelbarrow is a cart with one wheel used for carrying heavy loads.

phase_2_37.md.definition: A screwdriver is a tool used for driving and removing screws.

phase_2_38.md.definition: A dustpan is a pan used with a broom to collect dust.

phase_2_39.md.definition: A handsaw is a saw used by hand for cutting wood.

phase_2_40.md.definition: A rowboat is a boat moved by oars used for crossing water.

phase_2_41.md.definition: A sailboat is a boat moved by wind used for sailing.

phase_2_42.md.definition: A tugboat is a boat used for pulling large ships.

phase_2_43.md.definition: A motorboat is a boat moved by a motor used for fast travel on water.

phase_2_44.md.definition: A steamboat is a boat powered by steam used for river travel.

phase_2_45.md.definition: A dollhouse is a small house for dolls used for pretend play.

phase_2_46.md.definition: A basketball is a large round ball used for shooting into a hoop.

phase_2_47.md.definition: A softball is a large ball used for hitting with a bat.

phase_2_48.md.definition: A stickball is a small ball used for hitting with a stick.

phase_2_49.md.definition: A sandbox is a box of sand used for digging and playing.

phase_2_50.md.definition: A seesaw is a board used for riding up and down.

phase_2_51.md.definition: A pinwheel is a toy that spins to show the movement of wind.

phase_2_52.md.definition: An earlobe is the soft part at the bottom of an ear.

phase_2_53.md.definition: A kneecap is a bone that protects the knee joint.

phase_2_54.md.definition: An eyelid is a cover for the eye that protects and keeps it moist.

phase_2_55.md.definition: A fingertip is the end of a finger used for touching and feeling.

phase_2_56.md.definition: A thumbnail is the nail on a thumb used for pressing and gripping.

phase_2_57.md.definition: A backbone is the line of bones in the back that holds the body up.

phase_2_58.md.definition: A jawbone is the bone of the jaw that holds the teeth and moves for eating.

phase_2_59.md.definition: A forehead is the front part of the head above the eyes where warmth is felt.

phase_2_60.md.definition: A shinbone is the bone in the front of the lower leg that supports and protects.

phase_2_61.md.definition: A collarbone is a bone at the top of the chest that connects the shoulder.

phase_2_62.md.definition: A farmhouse is a house on a farm where farmers live.

phase_2_63.md.definition: A farmyard is the yard of a farm where animals move and work is done.

phase_2_64.md.definition: A treetop is the top of a tree where birds rest and nest.

phase_2_65.md.definition: A seashore is the edge of the sea where waves break and people walk.

phase_2_66.md.definition: A cornfield is a field where corn is grown for food.

phase_2_67.md.definition: A hilltop is the top of a hill that gives a wide view.

phase_2_68.md.definition: A woodland is an area of trees where animals and plants live.

phase_3_01.md.definition: A cup of water is water in a cup for drinking.

phase_3_02.md.definition: A glass of milk is milk in a glass for drinking.

phase_3_03.md.definition: A bowl of soup is soup in a bowl for eating.

phase_3_04.md.definition: A bag of flour is flour in a bag used for baking.

phase_3_05.md.definition: A bottle of oil is oil in a bottle used for cooking.

phase_3_06.md.definition: A pot of water is water in a pot used for cooking.

phase_3_07.md.definition: A jar of honey is honey in a jar used for spreading and eating.

phase_3_08.md.definition: A bucket of water is water in a bucket used for washing.

phase_3_09.md.definition: A drop of rain is water from a cloud that wets the ground.

phase_3_10.md.definition: A gust of wind is a strong move of air that pushes and bends things.

phase_3_11.md.definition: A ray of sun is light from the sun that warms and lights what it touches.

phase_3_12.md.definition: A blade of grass is a thin green piece of grass that grows from the ground.

phase_3_13.md.definition: A flake of snow is frozen water from a cloud that wets what it lands on.

phase_3_14.md.definition: A crack of thunder is a loud sound in a storm that shakes the air.

phase_3_15.md.definition: A beam of light is a line of light that helps things be seen.

phase_3_16.md.definition: A patch of ice is a flat piece of frozen water that makes surfaces slick.

phase_3_17.md.definition: A pile of snow is a heap of snow that blocks and covers.

phase_3_18.md.definition: A sheet of rain is a wide fall of rain that soaks the ground.

phase_3_19.md.definition: The top of the hill is the highest part of a hill that gives a wide view.

phase_3_20.md.definition: The edge of the road is the side of a road that marks where the road ends.

phase_3_21.md.definition: The foot of the tree is the base of a tree that holds the tree upright.

phase_3_22.md.definition: The bank of the river is the side of a river that guides the flow.

phase_3_23.md.definition: The rim of the cup is the top edge of a cup where the lips touch.

phase_3_24.md.definition: The tip of the branch is the end of a branch where leaves and buds grow.

phase_3_25.md.definition: The back of the hand is the outer side of a hand that protects the bones inside.

phase_3_26.md.definition: The neck of the bottle is the thin top of a bottle that controls the pour.

phase_3_27.md.definition: A block of wood is a solid piece of wood used for building and support.

phase_3_28.md.definition: The sun is a warm light that moves across the sky each day.

phase_3_29.md.definition: Rain is water from the sky that falls and fills the ground.

phase_3_30.md.definition: A fish is an animal that moves and rests in water.

phase_3_31.md.definition: A dog is an animal that moves and carries things on the ground.

phase_3_32.md.definition: Wind is moving air that carries things across the ground.

phase_3_33.md.definition: The moon is a round pale light that shines at night.

phase_3_34.md.definition: A cloud is a body of water in the sky that moves and covers the sun.

phase_3_35.md.definition: A bird is an animal that flies in the air to find food.

phase_3_36.md.definition: A river is a long body of moving water that flows over land.

phase_3_37.md.definition: A stone is a hard piece of rock used to hold and mark things.

phase_3_38.md.definition: A frog is an animal that lives on ground near water.

phase_3_39.md.definition: A nocturnal animal is an animal that moves at night.

phase_3_40.md.concept: a size tells how large or smal
phase_3_40.md.definition: A size tells how large or small a thing is.

phase_4_01.md.definition: A fire is burning heat and light.

phase_4_02.md.definition: A storm is strong weather with rain and wind.

phase_4_03.md.definition: Frost is ice that forms from cold air.

phase_4_04.md.definition: A flood is too much water on land.

phase_4_06.md.definition: A spider is an animal that makes webs.

phase_4_07.md.definition: A bee is an insect that makes honey.

phase_4_08.md.definition: A seed is a small thing that grows into a plant.

phase_4_09.md.definition: A leaf is a flat part of a plant.

phase_4_10.md.definition: Wood is hard material from a tree.

phase_4_11.md.definition: A wave is moving water that rises and falls.

phase_4_12.md.definition: A flower is the blooming part of a plant.

phase_4_13.md.definition: An ant is a small insect that walks in lines and carries food.

phase_4_14.md.definition: A snail is a small animal with a shell that moves slowly.

phase_4_15.md.definition: A cow is an animal that eats grass and gives milk.

phase_4_16.md.definition: A sheep is an animal with wool that eats grass.

phase_4_17.md.definition: A duck is a bird that swims and makes a quack.

phase_4_18.md.definition: A goose is a bird that can hiss and lives near water.

phase_4_19.md.definition: A chicken is a bird that pecks and lays eggs.

phase_4_20.md.definition: A turkey is a bird with feathers that gobbles.

phase_4_21.md.definition: A hamster is a small animal that runs on a wheel and lives in a cage.

phase_4_22.md.definition: A squirrel is an animal that lives in trees and eats nuts.

phase_4_23.md.definition: A mouse is a small animal that squeaks and lives in holes.

phase_4_24.md.definition: A rat is an animal that scurries and lives in holes.

phase_4_25.md.definition: A bat is an animal that flies at night and lives in caves.

phase_4_26.md.definition: An owl is a bird that hoots and hunts at night.

phase_4_27.md.definition: An eagle is a bird that soars and catches fish.

phase_4_28.md.definition: A hawk is a bird that dives to catch animals.

phase_4_29.md.definition: A ladybug is an insect with spots that can fly.

phase_4_30.md.definition: A dragonfly is an insect that hovers near water.

phase_4_31.md.definition: A grasshopper is an insect that jumps and eats leaves.

phase_4_32.md.definition: A cricket is an insect that chirps at night.

phase_4_33.md.definition: A tadpole is a young animal that grows into a frog.

phase_4_34.md.definition: A lizard is an animal that crawls and sits in the sun.

phase_4_35.md.definition: A snake is a long animal that hisses and moves on the ground.

phase_4_36.md.definition: An alligator is a large animal that swims and has a strong jaw.

phase_4_37.md.definition: A whale is a large animal that lives in the ocean.

phase_4_38.md.definition: A dolphin is an animal that jumps and makes clicks in water.

phase_4_39.md.definition: A shark is a fish that swims in the ocean and has a fin.

phase_4_40.md.definition: An octopus is an animal with arms that lives in the ocean.

phase_4_41.md.definition: A clam is an animal with a shell that opens and closes.

phase_4_42.md.definition: A starfish is an animal with arms that lives in the water.

phase_4_43.md.definition: A jellyfish is an animal that floats in water and has tentacles.

phase_4_44.md.definition: Coral is a sea animal that grows in reefs and has color.

phase_4_45.md.definition: Seaweed is a plant that floats in water.

phase_4_46.md.definition: A shell is a hard covering found on the sand by the sea.

phase_4_47.md.definition: A pearl is a small white object that shines and forms in an oyster.

phase_4_48.md.definition: Sand is small grains found on a beach.

phase_4_49.md.definition: A rock is a hard object that can crack.

phase_4_50.md.definition: A mountain is a very high land with a top.

phase_4_51.md.definition: A valley is low land between mountains with grass and often a river.

phase_4_52.md.definition: A desert is a dry place with sand and strong sun.

phase_4_53.md.definition: A jungle is a wet place with many plants and animals.

phase_4_54.md.definition: A meadow is a field with grass and flowers.

phase_4_55.md.definition: An orchard is a place where fruit trees grow.

phase_4_56.md.definition: A vineyard is a place where grapes grow for wine.

phase_4_57.md.definition: Rice is a plant that grows in water and is used as food.

phase_4_58.md.definition: Wheat is a plant that grows in fields and is used for bread.

phase_4_59.md.definition: Corn is a plant that grows ears covered by husks.

phase_4_60.md.definition: A bean is a seed that grows in a pod.

phase_4_61.md.definition: A pea is a small sweet seed that grows in a pod.

phase_4_62.md.definition: An orange is a fruit with a peel and juice inside.

phase_4_63.md.definition: A grape is a small fruit that grows in bunches on vines.

phase_4_64.md.definition: A strawberry is a red fruit with seeds on the outside.

phase_4_65.md.definition: A blueberry is a small blue fruit that grows on bushes.

phase_4_66.md.definition: A watermelon is a large fruit with a green outside and red inside.

phase_4_67.md.definition: A pumpkin is a large orange fruit that can be carved.

phase_4_68.md.definition: A potato is a brown root with eyes that grows in soil.

phase_4_69.md.definition: An onion is a plant with layers that grows in the ground.

phase_4_70.md.definition: Garlic is a plant with cloves that grow in a bulb.

phase_4_71.md.definition: Lettuce is a green plant with leaves that crunch.

phase_4_72.md.definition: A cabbage is a plant with a round head of leaves.

phase_4_73.md.definition: Spinach is a green plant with leaves that can be cooked.

phase_4_74.md.definition: Broccoli is a plant with green flower heads on a stalk.

phase_4_75.md.definition: Cauliflower is a plant with a white flower head.

phase_5_01.md.concept: the bird flies to the worm to
phase_5_01.md.definition: The bird flies to the worm to eat.

phase_5_02.md.concept: the bird flies to the nest to
phase_5_02.md.definition: The bird flies to the nest to sleep.

phase_5_03.md.concept: the bird flies to the pond to
phase_5_03.md.definition: The bird flies to the pond to drink.

phase_5_04.md.concept: the bunny hops to the carrot t
phase_5_04.md.definition: The bunny hops to the carrot to eat.

phase_5_05.md.concept: the bunny hops to the hole to
phase_5_05.md.definition: The bunny hops to the hole to rest.

phase_5_06.md.definition: The bunny hops to the pond to drink.

phase_5_07.md.definition: The frog jumps to the worm to eat.

phase_5_08.md.concept: the frog jumps to the leaf to
phase_5_08.md.definition: The frog jumps to the leaf to rest.
